finding_results.notes: The fall now lands on Thursday, October 1, 2026. Burt returns two days later on Saturday, and the meeting lands on the following Thursday, so the elapsed-time markers map to one real early-October calendar.
finding_results.summary: Realigned the incident date and adjacent time markers so the chapter's fall, return, and meeting all fit a single timeline.

finding_results.notes: Earl explicitly acknowledges that Carmen moved the dictionary. Harry states that Earl told him and that he told Agnes, while Lola learns the fact during the meeting. Carmen gives the stash location, Agnes takes custody of the dictionary, and she orders Burt's already-diverted tablets destroyed rather than returned to circulation.
finding_results.summary: Made the chain of knowledge, stash location, and disposition of Burt's diverted tablets explicit on the page.

finding_results.notes: The close now moves quickly from Carmen's 'us' and Agnes's refusal into concrete operational change: stash retrieval, destruction of the pills, and Harry striking Burt from the active list. The abstract explanatory paragraphs and the redundant final pronoun beat were removed.
finding_results.summary: Compressed the explanatory tail and replaced it with new observable consequence.

finding_results.notes: Recast the repeated narrator-side negation/correction beats into direct description and action. The only remaining 'Not ...' construction in the back half is Agnes's deliberate ethical triad at chapters/chapter_11.md:137, which functions as character rhetoric rather than the flagged reversal scaffold.
finding_results.summary: The chapter's back half no longer relies on the same 'Not X. Y.' emphasis pattern to land Burt's diminished return, Harry's visible age, and Earl's repeated testimony.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 11 now resolves its internal calendar, makes the Burt dictionary chain legible as covert procedure, and ends on an irreversible operational consequence instead of abstract restatement.
Resolved the packet's prose tic by varying sentence shapes across the flagged back-half emphasis beats while preserving the chapter's crisis engine, bodily specificity, and character voice.
